subject: Trunks in a forward-reaching energy-channeling pose, blue-purple hair, fighting stance
description: A young male figure with blue-purple hair stands in a dynamic forward-reaching stance, both hands extended outward with energy gathering at the fingertips. The figure wears a jacket and fighting outfit consistent with Future Trunks' visual design. The energy around the hands is white-blue and crackles with intensity. The background is a dark blue with energy shimmers. No sword is visible in the hands — the figure is channeling energy with open hands. The composition is a full mid-shot capturing the entire body in the action pose, with motion blur suggesting rapid movement.
foreground: young male fighter with blue-purple hair, hands extended forward with energy
background: dark blue energy field with shimmer effects
vision_uncertainty: no-sword-visible-in-image — hands open with energy, not gripping weapon
